req.title: Immunization record (boundary)
req.statement: A clinician shall record an Immunization with administered date not in the future. Boundary cases on timestamps and numeric elements must be tested.

doc.reasoning: The requirement constrains the administered date to not be in the future. Key partitions are: (1) valid past dates, (2) today (boundary), (3) tomorrow (boundary+1, invalid), (4) far-future dates (invalid). BVA drives the today/tomorrow split. EP covers normal valid and clearly-invalid ranges. NEG covers future dates. DT covers the combination of role + date validity. STC is applied to the state change from 'no record' to 'recorded' via a successful POST.

tests.name: test_immunization_past_date_returns_201
preconditions: Administered date is a valid past date (30 days ago)
actions: Obtain clinician auth token via <fixture:clinician_auth_token>
Build Immunization payload with occurrenceDateTime set to today minus 30 days
POST payload to /Immunization with Bearer token
expected: Response body contains an id field
trace: R-HLT-035: administered date not in the future
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
import requests

def test_immunization_past_date_returns_201(clinician_auth_token, base_url):
    past_date = (date.today() - timedelta(days=30)).isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "COVID-19"},
        "patient": {"reference": "Patient/example"},
        "occurrenceDateTime": past_date
    }
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {clinician_auth_token}",
               "Content-Type": "application/fhir+json"}
    resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/Immunization", json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("resourceType") == "Immunization"
    assert "id" in body

tests.name: test_immunization_future_date_returns_422
actions: Obtain clinician auth token via <fixture:clinician_auth_token>
Build Immunization payload with occurrenceDateTime set to today plus 1 day
POST payload to /Immunization with Bearer token
expected: Response body contains an error or issue element referencing occurrenceDateTime
trace: R-HLT-035: error pathway — 422 when date > today
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
import requests

def test_immunization_future_date_returns_422(clinician_auth_token, base_url):
    future_date = (date.today() + timedelta(days=1)).isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "COVID-19"},
        "patient": {"reference": "Patient/example"},
        "occurrenceDateTime": future_date
    }
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {clinician_auth_token}",
               "Content-Type": "application/fhir+json"}
    resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/Immunization", json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    issues = body.get("issue", body.get("errors", []))
    assert len(issues) > 0

tests.name: test_immunization_today_boundary_returns_201
preconditions: Administered date is exactly today (upper valid boundary)
actions: Obtain clinician auth token via <fixture:clinician_auth_token>
Build Immunization payload with occurrenceDateTime set to today's date
POST payload to /Immunization with Bearer token
expected: occurrenceDateTime in response matches today's date
trace: R-HLT-035: boundary — today is the last valid administered date
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date
import requests

def test_immunization_today_boundary_returns_201(clinician_auth_token, base_url):
    today = date.today().isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "Influenza"},
        "patient": {"reference": "Patient/example"},
        "occurrenceDateTime": today
    }
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {clinician_auth_token}",
               "Content-Type": "application/fhir+json"}
    resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/Immunization", json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("resourceType") == "Immunization"
    assert body.get("occurrenceDateTime", "").startswith(today)

POST payload to /Immunization with Bearer token
trace: R-HLT-035: error pathway — 422 when date > today (far future partition)
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
import requests

def test_immunization_far_future_date_returns_422(clinician_auth_token, base_url):
    far_future = (date.today() + timedelta(days=365)).isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "Hepatitis B"},
        "patient": {"reference": "Patient/example"},
        "occurrenceDateTime": far_future
    }
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {clinician_auth_token}",
               "Content-Type": "application/fhir+json"}
    resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/Immunization", json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 422

tests.name: test_immunization_state_transition_no_record_to_stored
preconditions: No prior Immunization record exists for the reference patient+vaccine combination
actions: Obtain clinician auth token via <fixture:clinician_auth_token>
Build Immunization payload with unique patient reference and occurrenceDateTime = yesterday
POST payload to /Immunization
GET /Immunization/<returned_id> to confirm persisted state
trace: R-HLT-035: state transition — system moves from no-record to immunization-stored
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
import requests
import uuid

def test_immunization_state_transition_no_record_to_stored(clinician_auth_token, base_url):
    yesterday = (date.today() - timedelta(days=1)).isoformat()
    patient_ref = f"Patient/{uuid.uuid4().hex}"
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "MMR"},
        "patient": {"reference": patient_ref},
        "occurrenceDateTime": yesterday
    }
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {clinician_auth_token}",
               "Content-Type": "application/fhir+json"}
    post_resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/Immunization", json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert post_resp.status_code == 201
    resource_id = post_resp.json()["id"]
    get_resp = requests.get(f"{base_url}/Immunization/{resource_id}", headers=headers)
    assert get_resp.status_code == 200
    body = get_resp.json()
    assert body.get("resourceType") == "Immunization"
    assert body.get("status") == "completed"

tests.name: test_immunization_decision_table_role_and_date_combinations
preconditions: Both clinician and non-clinician (patient) auth tokens available via fixtures
actions: Obtain clinician token via <fixture:clinician_auth_token>
Obtain non-clinician token via <fixture:patient_auth_token>
POST with clinician token + valid past date — expect 201
POST with clinician token + future date — expect 422
POST with non-clinician token + valid past date — expect 403
trace: R-HLT-035: decision table — role × date-validity combinations
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
import requests

def _build_payload(occurrence_date):
    return {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "Varicella"},
        "patient": {"reference": "Patient/example"},
        "occurrenceDateTime": occurrence_date
    }

def test_immunization_decision_table_role_and_date_combinations(
        clinician_auth_token, patient_auth_token, base_url):
    past = (date.today() - timedelta(days=1)).isoformat()
    future = (date.today() + timedelta(days=1)).isoformat()
    ct = "application/fhir+json"
    cli_hdr = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {clinician_auth_token}", "Content-Type": ct}
    pat_hdr = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {patient_auth_token}", "Content-Type": ct}
    url = f"{base_url}/Immunization"
    r1 = requests.post(url, json=_build_payload(past), headers=cli_hdr)
    assert r1.status_code == 201
    r2 = requests.post(url, json=_build_payload(future), headers=cli_hdr)
    assert r2.status_code == 422
    r3 = requests.post(url, json=_build_payload(past), headers=pat_hdr)
    assert r3.status_code in (401, 403)
